metadata.description: Converts normal map texture to proper normal vector with strength control

summary: Takes a normal map texture and converts RGB to normal vector in world/object space. Strength parameter controls effect intensity.

parameter_mapping.Strength: Multiply normal effect - formula: Normal = lerp(DefaultNormal, TextureNormal, Strength)

typical_setup: 1. Sample normal map texture (SampleTexture2D with Type=Normal)
2. Connect RGB output to Normal input
compatibility_loss_10_percent: Minor differences in OpenGL vs DirectX normal encoding for some edge cases
